The '''''Dragon''-class Heavy Cruiser''' was produced as part of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Tarkin Doctrine/Legends|Doctrine of Fear]], designed to intimidate entire [[Planet/Legends|planets]] into submission.

==Characteristics==
The ship was designed to resemble some beast out of the collective nightmares of all humanoid species. It stretched ominously from its vaguely head-shaped bow ending in a multiple-gun tower emplacement that resembles a deadly tail. Hangar bays sat open on either side of the bow like great maws, ready to release a store of 24 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] for attack, reconnaissance, and patrol missions.

{{Ship-stub}}

==History==
Only one ship of this type was ever known to be produced, the ''[[Galaxy Dragon]]'', which was operated by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Delurin]].
